name: Authentication & Subscription
description: JWT authentication and subscription tier management for AgentOS

name: Blog Publisher Channel Extension
description: Unified blog publishing adapter for Dev.to, Hashnode, Medium, and WordPress — publish, update, cross-post, and track analytics across all four platforms from a single interface.

name: Bluesky Channel Extension
description: Bidirectional Bluesky integration — post, reply, like, repost, search, follow, and track engagement via the AT Protocol.

name: Discord Channel Extension
description: Bidirectional Discord messaging via discord.js — supports text, embeds, images, documents, threads, reactions, and guild management.

name: Email Channel Extension
description: Bidirectional email integration — send, read, search, extract verification codes, and reply to email threads via SMTP and IMAP.

name: Facebook Channel Extension
description: Bidirectional Facebook integration — page posts, photos, videos, comments, likes, shares, and engagement analytics via Meta Graph API v19.

name: Farcaster Channel Extension
description: Bidirectional Farcaster integration — publish casts, reply, like, recast, search, and browse feeds via Neynar API.

name: Feishu / Lark Channel Extension
description: Feishu (Lark) bot via official SDK — supports outbound messages + inbound webhooks.

name: Google Business Profile Channel Extension
description: Bidirectional Google Business Profile integration — create local posts, reply to reviews, view analytics, and update business information via Google My Business API.

name: Google Chat Channel Extension
description: Google Workspace Chat via Cloud API — supports outbound messages + inbound webhooks.

name: iMessage Channel Extension
description: iMessage bridge via BlueBubbles — macOS server required. Supports outbound sends + inbound webhooks.

name: Instagram Channel Extension
description: Full Instagram integration — post photos, reels, stories, carousels, manage DMs, research hashtags, and track engagement via Instagram Graph API with browser automation fallback.

name: IRC Channel Extension
description: IRC channel adapter — supports inbound/outbound messages and channel joins.

name: Lemmy Channel Extension
description: Bidirectional Lemmy integration — create posts, comment, vote, search, subscribe to communities, and browse feeds via Lemmy HTTP API.

name: LINE Channel Extension
description: LINE Messaging API — inbound webhook (signature-verified) + outbound messaging.

name: LinkedIn Channel Extension
description: LinkedIn Marketing API v2 — posts, articles, comments, company pages, search, and engagement analytics.

name: Mastodon Channel Extension
description: Bidirectional Mastodon integration — post statuses, reply, boost, favourite, search trends, follow accounts, and track engagement via the Mastodon API.

name: Matrix Channel Extension
description: Matrix/Element via matrix-bot-sdk — decentralized, federated messaging.

name: Mattermost Channel Extension
description: Mattermost self-hosted chat — supports outbound posts and inbound WebSocket events.

name: NextCloud Talk Channel Extension
description: Nextcloud Talk bot API — self-hosted, privacy-focused team messaging via webhook bots.

name: Nostr Channel Extension
description: Nostr relay messaging via nostr-tools — decentralized, censorship-resistant encrypted DMs (NIP-04).

name: Pinterest Channel Extension
description: Pinterest integration — create pins, manage boards, search content, discover trends, track analytics, and schedule posts via Pinterest API v5.

name: Reddit Channel Extension
description: Bidirectional Reddit interaction via snoowrap — supports posting, commenting, voting, searching, trending, subscriptions, messaging, and analytics.

name: Signal Channel Extension
description: Signal messenger integration via signal-cli — end-to-end encrypted messaging.

name: Slack Channel Extension
description: Bidirectional Slack messaging via @slack/bolt — supports text, rich text, images, documents, threads, reactions, and group chat.

name: SMS Channel Extension
description: SMS messaging via Twilio — inbound webhook + outbound sends.

name: Microsoft Teams Channel Extension
description: Microsoft Teams bot via Bot Framework — supports inbound webhooks + proactive outbound sends.

name: Telegram Channel Extension
description: Bidirectional Telegram messaging via grammY — supports text, images, documents, inline keyboards, and groups.

name: Threads Channel Extension
description: Bidirectional Threads integration — post text, images, videos, carousels, reply, quote, like, search user threads, and track engagement analytics via Meta Threads Publishing API.

name: TikTok Channel Extension
description: TikTok integration — upload videos, discover trending sounds and hashtags, search content, track analytics, and engage with the community via TikTok API for Business.

name: Tlon (Urbit) Channel Extension
description: Tlon / Urbit messaging — peer-to-peer, identity-sovereign communication.

name: Twitch Channel Extension
description: Twitch IRC chat via tmi.js — supports inbound/outbound chat messaging.

name: Twitter/X Channel Extension
description: Bidirectional Twitter/X integration — post tweets, reply, quote, thread, search trends, DM, and track engagement via Twitter API v2.

name: WebChat Channel Extension
description: Lightweight web chat channel adapter — delegates to WunderlandGateway (Socket.IO) for transport. No external SDK required.

name: WhatsApp Channel Extension
description: Bidirectional WhatsApp messaging via Baileys — supports text, images, documents, typing indicators, and groups.

name: YouTube Channel Extension
description: YouTube integration — upload videos, publish Shorts, comment on videos, search content, discover trending, track analytics, manage playlists, and schedule publishing via YouTube Data API v3.

name: Zalo Channel Extension
description: Zalo Bot API — text messaging with optional webhook or long-polling.

name: Zalo Personal Channel Extension
description: Zalo personal account messaging via zca-cli (unofficial).

name: AWS Cloud Services
description: Deploy static sites to S3 with website hosting, manage Lightsail instances, configure Route53 DNS records, deploy apps via AWS Amplify, create CloudFront distributions, and deploy Lambda functions. Uses direct REST API calls with AWS Signature V4 signing — no SDK required.

name: Cloudflare Pages & Workers
description: Deploy Cloudflare Pages projects, manage DNS records, and deploy Workers. Supports static sites, full-stack frameworks, and edge functions via the Cloudflare API v4.

name: DigitalOcean Cloud Management
description: Manage DigitalOcean App Platform apps, Droplets, DNS records, and deployments. Supports creating and deploying PaaS apps from Git, provisioning VPS droplets, and full DNS record management.

name: Fly.io Cloud Deployment
description: Deploy and manage applications on Fly.io using the Machines API. Create apps, launch machines with custom configs, scale instances by count and size, and provision persistent volumes for stateful workloads.

name: Heroku Cloud Deployment
description: Create and manage Heroku apps, deploy from source tarballs, provision addons (Postgres, Redis, etc.), scale dynos, and stream logs via the Heroku Platform API.

name: Linode/Akamai Cloud
description: Provision Linode instances, deploy via StackScripts, manage DNS zones and records, and create NodeBalancers for load balancing via the Linode API v4.

name: Netlify Cloud Deployment
description: Deploy sites to Netlify, manage deployments, configure custom domains, and set environment variables. Supports static sites, Jamstack frameworks, serverless functions, and continuous deployment from Git.

name: Railway Cloud Deployment
description: Deploy services to Railway, manage projects and environments, provision database plugins (Postgres, Redis, MySQL, MongoDB), and stream deployment logs via the Railway GraphQL API.

name: Vercel Cloud Deployment
description: Deploy projects to Vercel, manage deployments, configure custom domains, and set environment variables. Supports Next.js, React, static sites, and serverless functions.

name: Notifications Extension
description: Unified multi-channel notification router — send, broadcast, and schedule notifications across all configured channels.

name: Telegram Bot Extension
description: Professional Telegram Bot API integration for AgentOS agents

name: Cloudflare Registrar
description: List, inspect, and manage domains registered through Cloudflare. Configure DNS records (A, AAAA, CNAME, TXT, MX, NS, SRV, CAA), update registrar settings (auto-renew, lock, privacy), and initiate domain transfers to Cloudflare via the Cloudflare API v4.

name: GoDaddy Domain Registrar
description: Search for available domains, register new domains, manage DNS records, and retrieve domain details via the GoDaddy API. Supports production and OTE sandbox environments.

name: Namecheap Domain Registrar
description: Search for available domains, register new domains, list owned domains, and manage DNS records via the Namecheap XML API. Supports both production and sandbox environments.

name: Porkbun Domain Registrar
description: Search, register, and manage domains through Porkbun. Configure DNS records (A, AAAA, CNAME, TXT, MX, NS), list owned domains, and initiate domain transfers via the Porkbun API v3.

name: Clearbit Enrichment Extension
description: Enrich company and person data via the Clearbit API for lead qualification and contact research

name: GitHub Extension
description: GitHub API tools — 26 tools for repos, issues, PRs, branches, commits, releases, Actions, files, gists, and codebase indexing.

name: Telegram Bot Extension
description: Professional Telegram Bot API integration for AgentOS - send messages, manage groups, handle callbacks

name: Giphy GIF Search Extension
description: Search for GIFs and stickers via Giphy API for embedding in agent posts

name: Image Search Extension
description: Search for stock photos from Pexels, Unsplash, and Pixabay with automatic fallback

name: Letterboxd Movie Lookup Extension
description: Look up movie metadata, ratings, and reviews from Letterboxd via scraping — no API key required

name: OMDB Movie & TV Search Extension
description: Search for movies, TV shows, and episodes via the OMDB API with detailed metadata including ratings from IMDB, Rotten Tomatoes, and Metacritic

name: Voice Synthesis Extension
description: Voice synthesis and transcription tools via OpenAI, ElevenLabs, Deepgram, and local Ollama/Whisper-compatible runtimes

name: Document Export
description: Generate PDF, DOCX, PPTX, CSV, and XLSX documents from structured content

name: Email Intelligence Extension
description: Query email threads, projects, attachments and generate reports via backend REST API.

name: Gmail Email Extension
description: Gmail email integration with OAuth2 — list, read, send, reply, search messages and manage labels.

name: Google Calendar Extension
description: Google Calendar integration with OAuth2 auth and event management — supports event CRUD, free/busy queries, and multi-calendar listing.

name: Interactive Widget Generator Extension
description: Generate self-contained interactive HTML/CSS/JS widgets with safety wrapping and file management

name: Provenance Anchor Providers
description: External anchor providers for the AgentOS provenance system — WORM storage, transparency logs, and blockchain timestamping

name: Content Extraction Extension
description: Extract clean text, markdown, and structured data from URLs, YouTube videos, Wikipedia articles, and PDF documents.

name: Deep Research Extension
description: Multi-source investigation engine with academic search, content scraping, aggregate search across engines, and trend discovery across platforms.

name: @framers/agentos-ext-hacker-news
description: Fetch and search Hacker News stories with category inference, filtering, and sorting. No API key required.

name: News Search Extension
description: Search for recent news articles via NewsAPI for agent awareness of current events

name: Stealth Browser Extension
description: Stealth browser automation with anti-detection — bypasses bot protection on sites like Amazon, eBay, LinkedIn using puppeteer-extra with stealth plugin

name: Weather Extension
description: Weather lookup via WeatherAPI.com (preferred) with Open-Meteo fallback (no key required)

name: Web Browser Extension
description: Browser automation capabilities for AgentOS - navigate pages, scrape content, click links, and capture screenshots

name: Intelligent Web Scraper
description: Progressive web scraping with fetch, Playwright, stealth, and LLM fallbacks

name: Web Search Extension
description: Professional web search, research aggregation, and fact-checking capabilities for AgentOS

name: Browser Automation Extension
description: Full browser automation for autonomous agents — navigate URLs, interact with DOM elements, capture screenshots, solve captchas, and rotate proxies. Powered by Playwright with persistent session support.

name: CLI Executor Extension
description: Execute shell commands and manage files for AgentOS agents

name: Credential Vault Extension
description: Encrypted in-memory credential storage with AES-256-GCM encryption, OAuth token rotation, and credential import/export.

name: Agent Delegation
description: Inter-agent communication tools for multi-agent collaboration. Ping, discover, and delegate tasks to remote Wunderland agents over HTTP.

name: Bulk Schedule Posts Tool
description: Schedule multiple social media posts at once. Accepts an array of posts with content, platforms, scheduled times, and optional media/hashtags. Supports template variables for dynamic content.

name: Image Editing
description: Edit images with img2img transformation, inpainting, outpainting, upscaling, and variations using OpenAI, Stability AI, or Replicate.

name: @framers/agentos-ext-image-generation
description: Generate images from text prompts using OpenAI, OpenRouter, Stability AI, or Replicate.

name: Media Upload Tool
description: Upload images, videos, and audio files to the media library for use in social posts. Returns an asset ID that can be referenced in post tools.

name: Multi-Channel Post Tool
description: Publish adapted content to multiple social platforms simultaneously. Handles platform-specific content adaptation, media format validation, and per-platform result tracking.

name: Site Deploy Orchestration
description: High-level deployment orchestrator that deploys sites from source to any supported cloud provider (Vercel, Cloudflare Pages, DigitalOcean, Netlify, Heroku, AWS, Linode, Railway, Fly.io) with optional custom domain registration and DNS configuration via any supported registrar (Porkbun, Namecheap, GoDaddy, Cloudflare).

name: Cross-Platform Social Analytics Tool
description: Aggregate engagement metrics (likes, comments, shares, impressions, engagement rate) across multiple social platforms in a single query.

name: Vision & OCR Pipeline
description: Progressive vision pipeline with PaddleOCR, TrOCR, Florence-2, CLIP, and cloud vision (GPT-4o, Claude).

name: Agent Personal Wallet
description: Give agents their own personal wallet with configurable spending guardrails. Supports Solana, Ethereum, Base, and Polygon with per-category budgets, daily/monthly limits, human-in-the-loop approval thresholds (compatible with hitl.llmJudge, hitl.cli, and hitl.webhook handlers), guardrail overrides for post-approval safety checks, and Lithic virtual card integration.

name: @framers/agentos-ext-amazon-polly
description: Text-to-speech via Amazon Polly

name: @framers/agentos-ext-diarization
description: Speaker diarization with provider delegation and local spectral-centroid clustering

name: @framers/agentos-ext-endpoint-semantic
description: Semantic endpoint detector with LLM turn-completeness classification

name: @framers/agentos-ext-google-cloud-stt
description: Batch speech-to-text via Google Cloud Speech-to-Text API

name: @framers/agentos-ext-google-cloud-tts
description: Text-to-speech via Google Cloud Text-to-Speech API

name: @framers/agentos-ext-openwakeword
description: Wake-word detection via OpenWakeWord ONNX models

name: @framers/agentos-ext-piper
description: Offline text-to-speech via Piper binary

name: Plivo Voice Provider Extension
description: Plivo telephony provider for voice calls — supports outbound/inbound calls, XML response generation, notify and conversation modes.

name: @framers/agentos-ext-porcupine
description: Wake-word detection via Picovoice Porcupine

name: @framers/agentos-ext-streaming-stt-deepgram
description: Real-time streaming STT via Deepgram WebSocket API

name: @framers/agentos-ext-streaming-stt-whisper
description: Chunked sliding-window streaming STT via OpenAI Whisper HTTP API

name: @framers/agentos-ext-streaming-tts-elevenlabs
description: Streaming TTS via ElevenLabs WebSocket API

name: @framers/agentos-ext-streaming-tts-openai
description: Streaming TTS via OpenAI Audio Speech API with adaptive sentence chunking

name: Telnyx Voice Call Extension
description: Telnyx telephony provider for voice calls via Call Control v2 — outbound/inbound calls, TTS speak commands, and bidirectional media streaming.

name: Twilio Voice Call Extension
description: Twilio telephony provider for voice calls — supports outbound/inbound calls, TwiML, media streams, and bidirectional audio.

name: @framers/agentos-ext-vosk
description: Offline speech-to-text via Vosk
